svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 18px; height: 1px; padding-top: 60px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; max-height: 16px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
